deferredIssues.reason: Hosted or public V8 SDK artifact source is not yet available.
deferredIssues.risk: Contributors can use resolver/cache/override flows, but the happy path still needs a publishable SDK source before public alpha packaging can claim V8 provisioning.
deferredIssues.followUpCondition: A hosted artifact endpoint or release-attached SDK source is available and validated by resolver checksum tests.

evidenceLanes.evidence: Windows x64 is the most complete local lane and owns the current package smoke path.
Hosted default non-V8 build/test and Unix scripts exist; package execution smoke is not default hosted evidence.
Hosted default non-V8 build/test and Unix scripts exist; package execution smoke is not default hosted evidence.
CMake/tooling paths are represented, but default hosted evidence is not currently a pass lane.
Resolver/cache/validation exists; hosted/public SDK artifact source remains #876.
Local package layout, manifest, checksums, docs, and outside-checkout smoke exist; public release readiness is not claimed.
Windows outside-checkout package smoke validates archive startup and prebuilt artifact behavior when run.
Source-input dogfood uses the existing fixture harness and reports V8-unavailable behavior in default non-V8 lanes.
Package-mode dogfood is skipped unless a package archive is supplied to the harness.
Live provider lanes require explicit services and are not default pass evidence.

consolidationRecommendation.condition: Review ALPHA-INFRA evidence with #876 deferred and keep final public docs/release verification outside this loop.
